name: Mecha-Dog Marron
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>機械犬</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>メカドッグ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>マロン
desc: When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the Graveyard, inflict 1000 damage to both players. When this card on the field is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard except by battle, inflict 1000 damage to your opponent.
mnst_eff: When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the Graveyard, inflict 1000 damage to both players. When this card on the field is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard except by battle, inflict 1000 damage to your opponent.
eff: When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the Graveyard, inflict 1000 damage to both players. When this card on the field is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard except by battle, inflict 1000 damage to your opponent.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
